acceptance_criteria.text: Проверить публичную доступность API YCLIENTS/Altegio и ограничения.
proof: Altegio public developer docs researched: partner + user auth, B2B APIs, limits.
YCLIENTS public support/docs researched: API access requires user token and app permissions.
Provider registry marks yclients/altegio available with required auth fields.
gaps: Live response mapping may need adjustment after sandbox test.

proof: Connector validate_credentials checks api_base_url, location_id, partner_token, user_token.
src/main.py connect endpoint rejects missing required fields.

acceptance_criteria.text: UI для ввода реквизитов и документации.
proof: frontend/src/components/FinanceCrmPanel.tsx renders credential inputs, docs link, capabilities and notes.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/main.py src/core/finance_crm.py src/core/finance_imports.py src/core/finance_kpis.py
cd frontend && npx eslint src/components/FinanceCrmPanel.tsx src/components/FinanceFirstStep.tsx src/components/FinanceImportPanel.tsx src/pages/dashboard/FinancePage.tsx
known_gaps: No real vendor credentials or partner agreement yet.
CRM appointment/client normalization remains a next-stage expansion.
